message:
🐛 Wire isDemoData for 5 AI/ML cards missing demo badge indicator (#1903)

Cards showing demo data without the Demo badge/yellow outline:
- LLMdConfigurator: add isDemoData: false (static card, never demo)
- LLMInference: destructure isDemoFallback from useCachedLLMdServers
- LLMModels: destructure isDemoFallback from useCachedLLMdModels
- HardwareHealthCard: destructure isDemoFallback from useCachedHardwareHealth
- GPUOverview: import useDemoMode, pass isDemoMode as isDemoData

Before: 0 demo badges shown when all cards display demo data
After: 12 demo badges shown (2 always-demo + 10 correctly detected)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
